name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement

labels: enhancement

---

## Feature Summary

<!-- A concise description of the feature you'd like -->

## Problem Statement

<!-- What problem does this solve? What pain point or limitation are you experiencing? -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe how you envision this working -->

## Use Case

<!-- Who benefits from this and how? Provide a concrete example -->

## Alternative Solutions

<!-- Any alternative approaches you've considered and why they fall short -->

## Composition boundary

<!--
Bob composes agent-governance-plane (AGP) as a pinned dependency and owns only the
agent/composition layer. If this feature belongs in the governance kernel (policy
gate, sandbox, HITL, journal, or the frozen contracts), it should be filed against
AGP instead. Note here where you think it belongs.
-->

## Priority

- [ ] Low — nice to have, no urgency
- [ ] Medium — would improve workflow noticeably
- [ ] High — blocking or significantly impacting productivity
- [ ] Critical — security, data loss, or compliance concern

## Additional Context

<!-- Mockups, links to similar features in other tools, related issues, etc. -->
